reason: The solution_uniqueness_guard failure indicates a test problem: the tests require a specific file path (pep_613_alias.rs) and specific coding patterns (no panic!, no unwrap, etc.), constraining the solution to match the gold patch exactly. An alternative correct fix implementing validation in existing files would fail these structural tests. The behavior_in_task_description and instruction_no_hint_leakage failures stem from this same constraint - the instruction must either include the required file path (causing hint leakage) or omit it (causing test failures). Since tests mandate implementation details, this requires test rewrites, not instruction changes.
